projects.name: PROMETHEUS AI V2.0
projects.summary: A privacy-centric local-first GenAI system powered by Llama 3.2, voice features, Ollama, and Apple MLX.
projects.problem: Enable private, local AI interaction with strong performance and a premium user experience.

projects.name: Resolvit-AI
projects.summary: An AI-powered civic issue resolution platform with modern workflows, tracking, and authority-grade operations.
projects.problem: Improve reporting, routing, and resolution of civic issues using AI-enhanced workflows.

projects.name: BenchAI
projects.summary: An offline LLM + RAG-powered smart classroom assistant designed for multilingual learning support without internet dependency.
projects.problem: Deliver AI learning support in low-connectivity environments.
